title: agrostis stolonifera subsp. gigantea
intro: Agrostis stolonifera subsp. gigantea, commonly known as giant creeping bentgrass, is a subspecies of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It is native to Asia and Europe and has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Agrostis stolonifera subsp. gigantea include reducing inflammation, soothing skin irritations, and aiding in wound healing. The plant is often prepared as a tea or tincture for medicinal purposes, and its leaves can also be used in herbal infusions or dried for later use.
